query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CAST(total AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_credits FROM orders WHERE orderNumber LIKE 'CM-%' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.d2c4bdf1aaee --database X4Qkp2kKx9JEdEZTkB9mBy --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CAST(total AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_credits FROM orders WHERE orderNumber LIKE 'CM-%' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12;
